hd5e7acbdgc235g4a0dgbca0g4be2e7a31d47: Your training serves you well, child of Gith. I'm in your debt.
he5448b88ge4b3g44deg8afbg9c60b6ab0584: You honour your clan, sir. I'm in your debt.
h09f29c23ga65eg4243g82cbg5de2ec660fe5: You honour your clan, miss. I'm in your debt.
hda905bdegd527g4a35g9e59g60e1eb26c7f2: You honour your own name, Blade of Frontiers. I'm in your debt.
hd4ad4111g1e57g4cfagbf72gfb844a6d587d: Your boldness is a blessing - I'm in your debt.
h3a6c07ffg1932g4a72ga6dfg2f6920a09814: It takes more than mere fire to break me, Yeva.
h6e9a5193g2cebg4790g94cag5e649531c14a: Now listen close, fist: duty calls. Drow have taken Grand Duke Ulder Ravengard - westward, if my eyes and ears can be believed.
hd3d2922dge3acg4ff4g82f2gf6f1fdfb135f: Gauntlet - report to the manip and send for reinforcements. We must find the Duke.
hca026086g171fg40f1gae91g6bcb9d0d4f2e: The rest of you - count the dead. Take word of their sacrifice to the city.
h86c7ac48gd425g4039gacf5g3a7e9972c36f: And you, githyanki - I must ask again for your aid.
h615ed70dg3a4ag42a7gbad7g3e8156093902: And you - dare I hope the Blade may twice bless me?
hb1956fe0gb836g4667g8405geba6cee17fa6: And you - I must ask again for your aid.
h18f2f787gcfe2g48cdgbc82g3b1ec473c1f0: Please - rescue Ravengard from his drow captors. The Council will reward you for your effort.
h09bb3bf0g003dg4e94g95eagb3a428a068ff: May I trust you'll see it through?
h7de94fafg0fa9g432fga7eeg6d4bb268f97e: I know Ravengard. The heart of a dragon!
h1814c8fag7197g4c91g97ebg21ef9e81ddd1: Then you've much in common with him, Blade. For the Duke's sake, I hope you'll lend me your talents.
hec952e1ag7a2bg483fg82b8gd8fb0a04113f: Why entrust this to me? You have others at your command.
he74bdda1g98ceg45fag9d5ag8ea6a88285ee: Isn't it clear? The Blade is known for action. Who might I trust, if not a legend?
hb1b609dcg2e9fg4f07g9d75gbf5d3ff5951f: Isn't it clear? You travel wih the Blade. Who might I trust, if not a legend?
h1b4c0b42g90d0g4ba0g8f4eg23c0832cc9d4: By the time aid arrives, it might be too late. You've the heart of a dragon and the will of a hero. Tell me I can count on you.
hef9a517egd7efg4645g8fe6gb8956febd75e: The drow took the duke to Moonrise Towers.
he016c933g5475g4fecgbc6fgf1a8b5330746: Moonrise Towers? Along the old road? That place is cursed. Few could survive there...
heabe3324g2b46g4f7bgb6f9g89a0da12da74: ... unless darker forces are at work.
h7914e239g95aag4561gaf65g54cf147e1205: This was no random attack. The Grand Duke was their target.
h4e32837bga554g4a86gae0eg2b027d5f4cdc: Whoever holds Ravengard is my target. I'll head west and find them.
h9d43e14egde22g4650g82c7g0c0295f5de35: Thank you. And should your courage falter, remember the Duke's generosity.
hc0ff4b93gbf70g473fg885fg6ea005ddfece: Go. You should pick up the drow trail with ease.
h5af40767geafcg4713g8f4dg67970767dda5: I will seek reinforcements and join you when I can.
h24ef02aag9c5ag456cgb13egfd4ede8199ff: Counsellor! You mustn't trust this so-called Blade of Frontiers.
h1af343e9g7f75g4f13g9761g58e8f671cc17: I know what you are, Wyll. I know what you've done.
h91f76d1fg888dg4bc6gaa4egb5c4d2dcd980: And I know you're no hero.
